description: Configure Chrome on a 911 dispatch terminal workstation according to the center's Terminal Configuration Standard located at ~/Desktop/dispatch_terminal_standard.txt. Implement all requirements specified in the document, including enabling specific Chrome experiments (flags), adjusting font sizes for readability, setting site-specific geolocation and notification permissions for emergency portals, organizing 20 existing bookmarks into 4 specified folders, configuring startup pages, setting the default download directory to ~/Documents/Dispatch_Records with prompt enabled, and disabling all password and autofill settings.
